understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate each grid level and complete all goal cells by stepping onto them only when the carried piece exactly matched the goal’s required shape, color, and rotation; completing all goals in a level advances to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game while avoiding running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0 you lose 1 life and stamina resets to max, and losing all lives ends the game. Movement is constrained by walls, and the state provides blocked_directions that must never be chosen because they waste a turn and stamina without moving. The carried piece can be modified by stepping on modifier tiles: shape modifiers cycle shape IDs 0–5, color modifiers cycle colors in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation modifiers rotate 90° clockwise through 0°→90°→180°→270°→0°. A goal cell completes only if shape, color, and rotation all match simultaneously when you step onto it.

history.summary: Turn budget (100) exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate each grid level and complete all goal cells by stepping onto them only when the carried piece exactly matched the goal’s required shape, color, and rotation; completing all goals in a level advances to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game while avoiding running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0 you lose 1 life and stamina resets to max, and losing all lives ends the game. Movement is constrained by walls, and the state provides blocked_directions that must never be chosen because they waste a turn and stamina without moving. The carried piece can be modified by stepping on modifier tiles: shape modifiers cycle shape IDs 0–5, color modifiers cycle colors in order orange→blue→green→red→orange, and rotation modifiers rotate 90° clockwise through 0°→90°→180°→270°→0°. A goal cell completes only if shape, color, and rotation all match simultaneously when you step onto it.
